name: Julie Hickman
body: We are SO happy to share this incredible news with the prayer warriors we rallied all over (Ohio, North Carolina, Florida) for Lyla and you all during this journey. Her lovely smile and your heartfelt story brings tears to our eyes . Thanks for your transparency Lee!Uncle Paul and Aunt Julie

name: Emily Lee
body: Praise God! Every "little" thing in there is a victory. Praise God for those hand-picked things God had to use in our lives to get our attention and fully depend on Him! For when I am weak, then I am strong. ❤️

name: Nancy Rapaszky
body: Giving thanks for what seemed to be an acceptable day and praying that each new day is better than the previous one.

name: Cathy Meals
body: Dear sweet Lyla! Your Uncle Wayne and I are praying for you every single day and know that God's presence is with you always. Your little face shines biggerthan all the stars up above - how could He not notice? We love you so much! Praise God for all His blessings!

name: Linda Zamora
body: I am a friend of Julie and Paul. On Thursday as she was in surgery I was at my weekly prayer group where over 100 women were praying for Lyla. They will be as elated as I am to hear how well she did!

name: Michelle Turkstra
body: Amazing! So grateful for such a positive day? God has been deep at work in and through every single situation in each of your lives. Your testimonies sing of beauty from ashes. Praise God!

name: Deborah Fletcher
body: Praising God!!! His mercies are new every morning!

name: Judith Klopfenstein
body: Best news evah!!! ❤️🙏 Aunt Judy & Uncle Joe xoxo

name: Molly Calhoun
body: So incredibly amazing!! Love to you all! God is so Good!! ❤

name: Laura Click
body: The best news! I have been waiting to hear how she was doing. She is an amazingly tough, little girl!

name: Mindy Leach
body: This is such INCREDIBLE news!!! Love to see pictures of that sweet smile! 🥰🥰🥰

name: Tom Bridge
body: Praise the Lord for such an encouraging post OP day #1!!
